raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Move the worker to fresh air immediately.
STEP 2: Loosen tight clothing around the neck and waist.
STEP 3: Keep the worker warm and at rest.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting if any was swallowed.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or a poison control center immediately. Provide the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Move the worker to fresh air immediately.
Loosen tight clothing around the neck and waist.
Keep the worker warm and at rest.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting if any was swallowed.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or a poison control center immediately. Provide the product label/SDS.
